abilities.name: Dumb Luck
abilities.description: Ogre Magi's max is always 0. grants him mana and mana regeneration instead.

abilities.name: Fireblast
abilities.description: Blasts an enemy unit with a wave of fire, dealing damage and stunning the target. Grants Ogre Magi a chance to passively proc Fireblast on attacks. These passive procs may proc Multicast as well.

abilities.name: Ignite
abilities.description: Applies damage per second and movement speed slow on the target and another random unit within the radius.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack speed if cast on Ogre Magi himself.

abilities.name: Unrefined Fireblast
abilities.description: Stuns and deals damage corresponding to the Ogre's.

abilities.name: Fire Shield
abilities.description: Creates a fire shield around the targeted ally, absorbing a percentage of the damage of next few attacks from enemy heroes. When an attack damage instance is absorbed, a fireball is launched at the enemy attacker.

abilities.name: Multicast
abilities.description: Multicast applies to Ogre's items as well, and only procs on offensive unit-targeted active item ability casts. Grants bonus Multicast Chance per current.
